name: Curried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and green pepper to the skillet. Cook until the onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in curry powder, slightly beaten egg, salt, pepper, and cayenne. Mix well.
4. Fold in the cooked rice and gently stir to combine.
5. Sprinkle with additional chopped green pepper if desired.
